name: Mint Julep
recipeInstructions:
Place six mint sprigs in a Collins glass. Add simple syrup and muddle the sprigs and syrup well. Add 1-1/2 ounces of Bourbon and stir. Fill glass with ice cubes and add remaining Bourbon. Stir well and garnish with an orange slice, lemon slice, and final mint sprig.
